title: Lenovo in the Studio!
excerpt: If you follow me on any of my social channels, then you likely already know about the collaboration I did with Lenovo for the Yoga 720 . It was an awesome opportunity that was months in the making and took…
body:
If you follow me on any of my social channels, then you likely already know about the collaboration I did with Lenovo for the Yoga 720. It was an awesome opportunity that was months in the making and took a team of over 15 people at my house to pull off! At one point during the 12 hour shoot day, I think we had half the crew in my teeny studio. It was an awesome experience and I will be posting the behind the scenes on my YouTube channel tomorrow!

You can check out the videos we filmed: 

Create Inspirational Art With Amy Tangerine & Lenovo Yoga 720 

Create A Custom T-shirt with Amy Tangerine & Lenovo Yoga 720

Would love to hear your thoughts! Also, since so many of you asked when I shared on Instastories, the dress is available here!

Disclosure: This post was sponsored by Lenovo, but all opinions and experiences I mentioned are my own. My creative partners and I really appreciate your continued support!
